text: The Nathinim are sometimes identified with the porters described in verses 17-27, but these were Levites, and the Nathinim seem to be mentioned here as a separate class among the inhabitants.
Perhaps rather, according to the Hebrew text, ‘to this day’.
‘There in the Lord’s presence’; the sense of the Hebrew text is rather ‘the Lord be with him!’
Verses 35-44 are a repetition of 8.29-39, with one or two minor differences.
